prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Recurrent nocturnal hypoglycemia (2-4 episodes/month, self-resolved) over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 18units once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 70.1 kg; Height 180.2 cm; BMI 21.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 7.0%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 156mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 197mg/dL; 3 months ago 185mg/dL; current 179mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.7kg; 9 months ago 69.1kg; 6 months ago 66.7kg; 3 months ago 65.1kg; current 70.1kg), Height (12 months ago 180.2cm; 9 months ago 180.2cm; 6 months ago 180.2cm; 3 months ago 180.2cm; current 180.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 8.0U/L; 3 months ago 9.0U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; current 10mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 150mg/g; 9 months ago 165mg/g; 6 months ago 142mg/g; 3 months ago 151mg/g; current 112mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 140mg/dL; 9 months ago 135mg/dL; 6 months ago 138mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.54 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
